code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut done = false
  while i < tokens.len() and not done
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let num = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      n
    when None
      0
    end
    if num < 0
      done = true
    else
      sum = sum + num
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
  print("partial=#{sum}")
end
